entries.source_excerpt: Audit every reference to Playwright tests / user-flow tests. Every reference must be unambiguous: tests simulate a real human via page.goto / page.click / page.fill / page.waitFor and assert visible state. Direct API calls in place of user clicks are forbidden except page.route for error mocking.
acceptance_criteria: Grep audit of the 9 named files confirms no remaining ambiguous language around what a Playwright test is.
Explicit anti-pattern row added to playwright-user-flows naming page.evaluate(fetch) / page.request.* / axios.* as the forbidden patterns.
Hard rules in agents/frontend.md, agents/integration.md call out the forbidden patterns by name.

entries.source_excerpt: Create agents/test-completeness-verifier.md — read-only agent that verifies unit + integration + Playwright tests all ran AND meet spec acceptance criteria. Tools Read/Glob/Grep/LS/Bash/TodoWrite only. Model sonnet. Color red. Output structured verdict JSON. Escalates via SR auto-spawn on failure.
acceptance_criteria: agents/test-completeness-verifier.md exists with all 5 required frontmatter keys (name / description / tools / model / color).
tools field is read-only set: Read, Glob, Grep, LS, Bash, TodoWrite (no Edit/Write).
model: sonnet. color: red.
presence test added to tests/test_agents.py EXPECTED_AGENTS; passes.
Body documents the verdict JSON schema and the SR-on-failure escalation behavior.

entries.source_excerpt: Hook enforcement of test-kind completeness. Add test_completeness_review field (pass / n/a / fail). fail blocks; n/a requires non-empty test_completeness_review_note; pass allows.
acceptance_criteria: REQUIRED_EVIDENCE_FIELDS includes test_completeness_review.
VALID_TEST_COMPLETENESS_VALUES constant defined as {pass, n/a, fail}.
_validate() blocks fail / invalid / n/a-without-note with structured stderr message.
Hook tests cover all branches (pass / fail / missing / parametrized invalid / parametrized n/a-without-note); all pass.

entries.source_excerpt: Loop discipline re-uses v0.7.0 SR auto-spawn. Add test-completeness-failure to origin.kind enum; verifier writes SR on any kind failing.
acceptance_criteria: team-spawning-and-review-gates ## Solution Requirements: origin.kind enum updated to include test-completeness-failure.
Verifier agent body documents the SR spawn behavior with the exact origin.kind value.

entries.source_excerpt: Tests for the new hook field and new agent. Full pytest suite passes; total ≥ 96.
acceptance_criteria: _valid_evidence helper updated (schema_version 3 + new field with n/a + note).
≥ 6 new test cases added (mirror v0.5.0 visual_fidelity_review structure).
EXPECTED_AGENTS in tests/test_agents.py includes test-completeness-verifier.
Full pytest suite passes; total ≥ 96.

entries.source_excerpt: Documentation refresh: CHANGELOG, README, CODEBASE_MAP, version bump to 0.9.0.
acceptance_criteria: CHANGELOG.md has v0.9.0 entry covering REQ-001..005.
README.md banner shows v0.9.0; agent count is 11; Loop 4d entry added.
CODEBASE_MAP.md agent table includes test-completeness-verifier; tests row updated.
plugin.json and marketplace.json version: 0.9.0.
